hero.title: CONGLOMERAT
hero.lead: The living directory of Cameroonian companies by city: interactive map, instant search and structured data to discover economic players near you.
how.title: How it works
how.1.title: Choose a city
how.1.text: Douala and Yaounde are ready; other Cameroonian cities can be added with a simple JSON file.
how.2.title: Explore the map
how.2.text: Businesses are geolocated, clustered and reachable from detailed cards.
how.3.title: Search fast
how.3.text: Fuse.js provides fuzzy search by name, sector, address, category or business hashtag.
how.4.title: Submit your business
how.4.text: An EmailJS form sends a listing for validation without a database or server.
cities.title: Available cities
businesses.title: Cameroonian businesses
businesses.subtitle: Filter, search and zoom to companies in Douala and Yaounde.
